visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) Close-up of a succulent piece of raw crab meat covered in vibrant orange roe, held by a hand wearing a clear plastic glove. In the background, a woman's lower face is partially visible. The lighting is bright and even, highlighting the glossy texture of the crab. (2) The woman, wearing a green TERRA apron and sunglasses on her head, brings the crab to her mouth and takes a large bite. She is sitting in a well-lit indoor restaurant space. The camera focuses on her facial expression and the physical act of chewing. (3) The scene shifts to the restaurant's interior showing a white wall with a red Michelin Guide 2024 sticker. A male waiter in a blue shirt and black apron moves through the dining area, which contains wooden tables and other seated patrons in the background. (4) The camera pans across a spread of Korean dishes on a wooden table. There are multiple plates of soy-marinated crabs, a bubbling pot of white soup with green vegetables, small side dishes in gold bowls, and a red Coca-Cola can. (5) The woman demonstrates different ways to eat the crab: first biting it directly, then mixing the meat with white rice in a metal bowl, and finally wrapping it in a sheet of dark green roasted seaweed using a spoon and chopsticks.
visual_base.text_narrative_log: (1) [Subtitle]: 來吃吃看曾經得過米其林的醬蟹. (2) [Subtitle]: 很幸運去的時候完全不用排隊. (3) [Variety]: 第一吃直接吃. (4) [Variety]: 第二吃配飯. (5) [Variety]: 第三吃配海苔. (6) [Subtitle]: 調味跟之前吃的醬蟹不太一樣. (7) [Subtitle]: 有點像台灣的鹹蜆仔. (8) [Subtitle]: 但多了一個不太喜歡的味道也不是腥味. (9) [Subtitle]: 但總算解鎖之前的想吃清單了紀錄到這 bye bye.

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 main female creator, 1 male waiter serving, and at least 3 other diners visible in the restaurant background.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: A young woman with dark hair, wearing a black tank top and a green TERRA branded apron, with sunglasses perched on top of her head.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: The interior of a Korean restaurant with wood-paneled accents, Michelin Guide signage, and tables filled with other customers. The atmosphere is casual and brightly lit.

audio_base.audio_narrative_log: (1) The video begins with upbeat, medium-tempo pop music featuring a male vocalist singing in English. The music contains a steady electronic beat and synth layers that persist as the dominant audio element throughout the entire clip. (2) As the scene moves into the restaurant, the sound of a male waiter saying 'gamsahamnida' in Korean is heard quietly. This is accompanied by the percussive clinking of ceramic dishes and bowls being arranged on a wooden table. (3) Background restaurant noise is audible, consisting of soft human chatter and environmental room tone from other diners. These sounds remain in the background, providing a natural atmosphere without interfering with the primary music track. (4) Subtle incidental noises, such as the rustling of plastic gloves and the soft metallic sound of spoons against metal bowls, occur periodically. These sounds correspond to the subject's eating actions but are kept at a low volume in the mix.

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: List-based: Intro -> Serving -> Three ways to eat -> Review Conclusion
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: To share a personal dining experience at a Michelin-recommended Korean soy-marinated crab restaurant, illustrating different ways to enjoy the dish and providing a brief review of the flavors through text overlays.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: The video appears to be a personal food vlog; brand logos like Terra are incidental to the restaurant environment.

high_inference.freeDescribe: The video relies entirely on on-screen text and background music to tell its story rather than spoken narration, emphasizing the visual appeal of the food.
